text.title: Remote Workshop Toolkit Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the remote-workshop-toolkit methodology end-to-end.

step.name: plan
step.action: Pick workshop type; draft agenda blocks; pick canvas template.

step.name: pre-read-and-ground-rules
step.action: Send pre-read ≥48h before; share ground rules on invite.

step.name: breakouts
step.action: Build 4–6 person breakouts with all four roles assigned.

step.name: time-zone-split-decision
step.action: Compute coverage_pct; split or async-relay if <80%.

step.name: run-and-read-out
step.action: Run workshop; capture decisions + parking-lot items.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
